name: ai-agent-hub
description: Local Codex launcher with tmux grid mode and native swarm desktop mode

scripts.validate:static: python3 -m py_compile scripts/codex_agent.py scripts/git_flow_common.py scripts/git_pr_flow.py scripts/start_work_branch.py tests/smoke_runner.py && bash -n tests/run-smoke-tests.sh scripts/launch-agent-swarm.sh scripts/install-codex-agent-shell.sh scripts/install-gh-local.sh scripts/gh-auth-login.sh scripts/codex-agent scripts/git-pr-flow scripts/start-work-branch scripts/launch-cli-hub.sh scripts/run-codex-pane.sh scripts/build-tmux-local.sh scripts/launch-hub.sh && node --check server/swarm-server.js && node --check server/index.js && node --check desktop/main.cjs
scripts.validate: npm run validate:static && npm test && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
